model_output.summary: The video features a fitness influencer performing back exercises, but the subject is almost exclusively filmed from behind, making face replacement impossible.
reasons: The subject's face is never visible throughout the entire video.
The camera angle is consistently from behind, focusing on the back muscles.
Face replacement requires a visible face to map the AI features onto.
